view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'All must be available for slot to show', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the availability of all necessary roles for the bookings made. The existing evidence confirms that bookings were made, but does not address the specific requirement of role availability, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive.
